svg.title: PSU B0/B1 fixed-domain centerline geometry census

cc:Work.dc:title: PSU B0/B1 fixed-domain centerline geometry census
cc:Work.dc:description: Four-panel deterministic centerline geometry census; no error bars; not reconstruction or physical cone validation

g.text: Deterministic centerline geometry census; no error bars. Not a reconstruction result and not physical validation of the released 25-degree cone.

g.text: Gray bands: views with B0 centerline misses (0, 3, 6). Star marker: active-mask B1 misses (0).
